mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT semester FROM st_course WHERE semester IS NOT NULL ORDER BY semester DESC
SELECT DISTINCT b.semester FROM st_score a LEFT JOIN st_course b ON a.cnumber = b.cnumber WHERE a.snumber = #{uid} AND b.semester IS NOT NULL ORDER BY b.semester DESC
SELECT DISTINCT b.semester FROM st_score a LEFT JOIN st_course b ON a.cnumber = b.cnumber WHERE b.semester IS NOT NULL ORDER BY b.semester DESC
SELECT a.*, b.title as cname FROM st_course a LEFT JOIN st_content b ON a.conid = b.id WHERE a.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE st_course SET c_endingtime = #{time} WHERE cnumber = #{cNumber}
mapper.select: SELECT upload_file_name FROM st_score WHERE sco_id = #{scoId}
mapper.update: UPDATE st_score SET upload_file_name = #{fileName}, submission_time = #{submitTime} WHERE sco_id = #{scoId}
mapper.select: SELECT count(a.sco_id) FROM st_score a LEFT JOIN st_course b ON a.cnumber = b.cnumber LEFT JOIN st_content ct ON b.conid = ct.id WHERE 1=1 AND a.cnumber = #{cnumber} AND ct.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{cname}, '%')

SELECT a.sco_id, a.cnumber, a.snumber, a.upload_file_name, a.degree_exp, a.degree_other, a.total_points, a.submission_time, ct.title as cname, b.semester, u.username, u.name as sname, u.college, u.professional, (SELECT org.name FROM st_orgrole ogr LEFT JOIN st_org org ON ogr.orgid = org.id WHERE ogr.userid = a.snumber LIMIT 1) as org_name FROM st_score a LEFT JOIN st_course b ON a.cnumber = b.cnumber LEFT JOIN st_content ct ON b.conid = ct.id LEFT JOIN st_user u ON a.snumber = u.uid WHERE 1=1 AND a.cnumber = #{cnumber} AND ct.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{cname}, '%') ORDER BY a.sco_id DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE st_score SET degree_exp = #{degreeExp}, degree_other = #{degreeOther}, total_points = #{totalPoints} WHERE sco_id = #{scoId}
mapper.select:
SELECT count(a.sco_id) FROM st_score a LEFT JOIN st_course b ON a.cnumber = b.cnumber
AND b.semester = #{time}

SELECT a.snumber, a.total_points, u.name as sname, u.college, u.professional, ct.title as cname, (SELECT org.name FROM st_orgrole ogr LEFT JOIN st_org org ON ogr.orgid = org.id WHERE ogr.userid = a.snumber LIMIT 1) as class_name FROM st_score a LEFT JOIN st_user u ON a.snumber = u.uid LEFT JOIN st_course b ON a.cnumber = b.cnumber LEFT JOIN st_content ct ON b.conid = ct.id ORDER BY b.semester DESC, u.uid ASC
